name: Scramble Text
description: Text decodes from random characters one position at a time. Supports mount, hover, and scroll-into-view triggers.
accessibility_notes: final text is readable — scramble is decorative transition

text.description: The target text to decode into

trigger.description: When to start the scramble animation

charset.description: Custom character set for the scramble noise — defaults to alphanumeric

className.description: CSS class for the span element

conflicts: monospace font forced via inline style — may clash with design system typography
inView trigger uses IntersectionObserver — requires polyfill for older browsers
